Package
Description
org.jscience.social.architecture
Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.

    ThermalSimulator.requiredInsulationThickness(List<ThermalSimulator.WallLayer> existingLayers, ThermalSimulator.ThermalMaterial insulation, double targetU, double rsi, double rse)
